title: DIY Boba Tea Slime Kit for Kids, Butter Slime Food, Fluffy & Stretchy, Instant Slime Making Kit & Scented, Boba Beads Mix'Ins & Demon Monster Charm, Sensory Gift Ages 5–12 & Teens, MOOZ Magic
features: Bobba butter your way: Blue + cream butter layers over mango boba jelly = smooth spread and soft pulls. With our semi-DIY slime kit, kids can change the feel fast — extra fluffy, glossy-soft, or cool and firm for cleaner swirls.

MOOZ Slimes: Big feelings, big crunch. Add your mix-ins, switch the K-pop demon charm, and pop away. After a fast texture transformation, the slime turns smooth, clean, and lightly scented for easy play.

Slime DIY texture play: Freeze for the perfect icy pull: Chill 30 min for a smooth BOBA jelly pull. Need it fast? A tiny pinch of baking soda gives instant stretch. Like it soft? Use cornstarch for cloud-soft sensation.
Safe, parent-approved fun: Made with EU-grade materials and tested by an independent European lab. Borax-free, non-toxic, clean, and kid-safe. Recommended for ages 5+.

The ultimate gift for kids and teens: This boba tea slime kit is a high-energy sensory toy perfect for Christmas, birthdays, holidays, and party favors. With its neon colors, crunchy texture, and creative play features, it’s a hit for boys, girls, and slime lovers of all kinds.

Collect It, Gift It – Why MOOZ? Start your MOOZ Squad with our 7oz jar, featuring one of 12 unique designs, each with a matching charm and collector card. Perfect as a cute gift for girls, teens, girlfriends, and sisters. Want more? Discover MOOZ 10x Ultimate Slime Kit for max variety or go big with the 25x blind bags Slime Party pack for the ultimate unboxing adventure!

MOOZ Cloud Slime, Bingsu Slime, Boba Tea Slime DIY Merchant video How do I DIY crunchy Bingsu slime? Want icy? → Freeze 30 min Want firmer? → Tiny pinch of baking soda Want max ASMR? → Hand cream (on hands) It feels too soft/sticky—how do I fix it? Our slimes are Borax-free, so they’re extra soft and sensitive to temperature. Good news, they are semi-DIY. If it feels sticky, just FREEZE it for 30min. Wanna instant crunch? Add a tiny pinch of baking soda/slime activator. It’s a bit firm—how do I soften it? Warm the sealed jar in your hands c.2 minutes or set it briefly in lukewarm water, then knead gently. Play safe & store it right Ages 5+. Not edible. Keep away from fabric/hair. Return slime to the resealable jar right after play; store cool, dry, out of sun. Loose beads? Normal for crunchy slime—press back in or discard; keep away from pets/small kids.
